details.reasoning: All rubric requirements fully met. The stepper.tsx component correctly exports all required sub-components (Stepper, StepperItem, StepperTrigger, StepperTitle, StepperDescription, StepperSeparator, StepperContent) plus additional useful exports (StepperIndicator, hooks). All components properly implement data-slot attributes with semantic names and use cn() for class merging. React context (StepperContext, StepItemContext) correctly shares state between sub-components with custom hooks. Horizontal and vertical orientation support is fully implemented. The stepper-demo.tsx example demonstrates proper usage with useState for active step management and shows multiple layout patterns. Both registry entries are correctly formatted with proper dependencies. No existing files were modified beyond necessary registry updates. Implementation quality is high with attention to accessibility, styling, and usability.
